prompt: my claude setup feels really off - it keeps asking me permission for everything, the CLAUDE.md is like 2000 lines long and half of it is copy-pasted from some blog post, and it never remembers what I told it last session. Can you figure out what's wrong and fix it?

assertions.text: Identifies that permissions are too restrictive as a specific problem
Identifies that CLAUDE.md is bloated/too long as a specific problem
Identifies missing or broken memory system as a specific problem
Structures diagnosis using the 7-pillar framework with scores
Produces a structured audit report (not just prose advice)
Provides specific, actionable fixes (not just 'improve your permissions')
